circuits.designation: Kitchenette radial (BS 1363 worktop sockets + FCU for fridge)
Toilet shaver supply unit (BS EN 61558-2-5 SSU)

non_compliance_flags.message: Toilet classified bathroom_zone_3 per KS 1700:2018 §701 (routes to BS 7671:2018+A2:2022 Part 7-701). Only the BS EN 61558-2-5 shaver supply unit is installed; no general 13A sockets within 3 m of zone 1 boundary.

All four circuits configured as radial (none ring) per Kenyan commercial engineering practice. KS 1700:2018 §433 routes to BS 7671:2018+A2:2022 §433.1.5 for ring final permission; design opts for radial-only to favour selectivity and maintenance access in tenant fit-out.

Zs verification deferred to calc.zs_loop_impedance per WI3. Per-circuit tool_call_pending_for_zs_verification=true; loop impedance to be confirmed at install per KS 1700:2018 §411.4.5 (routes to BS 7671:2018+A2:2022 §411.4.5).

assumptions: KPLC declared Ze=0.45Ω at the parent DB earthing terminal; not yet measured on site.
KPLC declared PSCC=9kA at DB-OFFICE-01 busbar; all MCBs selected with 9kA Icu per KS 1700:2018 §434 (routes to BS 7671:2018+A2:2022 §434.5.1) and IEC 60898-1 product range.
All four circuits radial per Kenyan commercial engineering practice; ring final circuits are permitted under KS 1700:2018 §433 routing but not used at this scale.
Diversity factors per KS 1700:2018 routing to BS 7671 + IET On-Site Guide Appendix A (workstations ~150 W per position; kitchenette diversified ~8 A simultaneous).
Toilet bathroom_zone_3 holds only shaver SSU; no general-purpose 13A sockets per KS 1700:2018 §701 (routes to BS 7671:2018+A2:2022 Part 7-701).
Cable routes assumed Reference Method 100/101 (concealed in stud/dropper) per KS 1700:2018 §523 routing to BS 7671:2018+A2:2022 Appendix 4; final route delegated to cable-containment skill.
Drafting follows BS 1192:2007+A2:2016 as the de facto Kenyan design industry convention for layered electrical drawings; a future drafting-standards layer will revisit.

drawing_notes: All workstation/reception sockets BS 1363 double 13A switched at 300 mm AFFL — low-mount under-desk position typical for KE commercial office fit-out.
Kitchenette worktop sockets at 1100 mm AFFL (150 mm above 950 mm worktop); under-counter fridge fed via 13A FCU on C03 at 300 mm AFFL.
Toilet bathroom_zone_3 SSU per KS 1700:2018 §701 (routes to BS 7671:2018+A2:2022 Part 7-701) — no general 13A outlets in toilet.
Layer naming per BS 1192:2007+A2:2016 (E-POW-OUTLET-GF for ground floor power outlets, E-POW-CIRCUIT-GF for circuit identification).

rationale.chat_summary: Kenya 80 m² Nairobi office unit. KPLC TN-S 415V TPN+E supply, Ze=0.45Ω, PSCC=9kA. 4 radial circuits per KS 1700:2018 §433 (commercial engineering practice favours radial over ring at this scale). C01+C02 workstations 20A; C03 kitchenette 20A; C04 toilet shaver SSU 6A. All Type A 30mA RCDs per KS 1700:2018 §411.3.3. Toilet bathroom_zone_3 per KS 1700:2018 §701. calc.zs_loop_impedance pending; engineer-declared Zs estimates pending verification.

sections.title: Jurisdiction + Supply
sections.summary: KE jurisdiction; KS 1700:2018 is the primary code. KPLC TN-S 415V TPN+E supply with declared Ze=0.45Ω and PSCC=9.0 kA at the DB-OFFICE-01 busbar. KS 1700:2018 §313 routes to BS 7671:2018+A2:2022 §313.1 for short-circuit verification, so MCB Icu selection follows IEC 60898-1.

decisions.label: TN-S supply confirmed
decisions.summary: KPLC provides a dedicated PE conductor separate from N at the parent DB earthing terminal; no PEN combination on site.

decisions.label: PSCC 9 kA → all MCBs ≥9 kA Icu
decisions.summary: Declared 9 kA at the busbar; every MCB must have a breaking capacity ≥ 9 kA. KS 1700:2018 §313 routes to BS 7671:2018+A2:2022 §313.1 for the short-circuit verification rule.
decisions.rule: OCPD breaking capacity ≥ prospective fault current

sections.title: Circuit Topology
sections.summary: Four radial circuits (none ring): C01+C02 cover workstations and reception, C03 covers kitchenette, C04 is a dedicated radial for the toilet shaver SSU. KS 1700:2018 §433 routes to BS 7671:2018+A2:2022 §433.1.5 permitting ring final circuits, but KE commercial engineering practice favours radial at this scale for selectivity.

decisions.label: Radial-only topology selected
decisions.summary: KE engineering convention for a small office prefers individual radials over rings; selectivity at the parent DB is cleaner and ring-continuity (r1/rn) testing is avoided.
decisions.rule: Radial final circuit per KS 1700:2018 §433 (routes to BS 7671:2018+A2:2022 §433.1.5)

decisions.label: Shaver SSU on dedicated 6 A radial
decisions.summary: The bathroom shaver supply unit (BS EN 61558-2-5) is isolated by a 6 A MCB so discrimination and limited fault energy in the toilet bathroom_zone_3 location is achieved.
decisions.rule: Dedicated final circuit for isolated SELV/SSU loads

sections.title: Special Locations
sections.summary: The toilet is the only special-location room. KS 1700:2018 §701 routes to BS 7671:2018+A2:2022 Part 7-701 (locations containing a bath/shower). Toilet classified `bathroom_zone_3`. Because §701.512.3 prohibits general 13 A sockets within 3 m of zone 1, only a BS EN 61558-2-5 shaver supply unit is installed (explicitly excepted by §701.512.3).

decisions.label: Toilet zone 3 — SSU only
decisions.summary: Only the isolating shaver supply unit is installed; no general 13 A socket outlets in the toilet. INV-05 (bathroom_zone_3 → SSU/SELV only) is satisfied.
decisions.rule: Shaver supply exception for bathroom zone 3

sections.title: RCD Posture
sections.summary: All four circuits use Type A 30 mA RCD protection (board-level upstream of the MCBs at DB-OFFICE-01). KS 1700:2018 §411.3.3 routes to BS 7671:2018+A2:2022 §411.3.3 for additional protection on socket outlets ≤32 A. Type A covers pulsating-DC residuals from office IT. No EV/PV loads ⇒ no Type B requirement and no §411 exception.

decisions.label: Type A 30 mA across all circuits
decisions.summary: Office workstation loads (laptops, monitors, LED drivers) can generate pulsating-DC residuals; Type A is the post-Amendment-2 default and the routed BS 7671 baseline for socket outlets ≤ 32 A.
decisions.rule: Additional protection by 30 mA RCD for socket outlets

sections.title: OCPD + Cable
sections.summary: C01-C03: 20 A MCB Type B + 2.5 mm² Cu PVC T+E radial. C04: 6 A MCB Type B + 1.5 mm² T+E. All MCBs Icu 9 kA matching declared PSCC (KS 1700:2018 §434 routes to BS 7671:2018+A2:2022 §434.5.1). Curve B universal — office loads no inrush, Type B 3-5× In gives best Zs margin per KS 1700:2018 §411.4.5.

decisions.label: 20 A radial sized 2.5 mm² Cu T+E
decisions.summary: 20 A Type B MCB + 2.5 mm² T+E in Reference Method 100/101 provides adequate ampacity (~27 A) and Zs headroom at workstation/kitchenette radial lengths ≤ 18 m.
decisions.rule: Cable sizing per KS 1700:2018 §523 routes to BS 7671:2018+A2:2022 Appendix 4

decisions.label: All MCBs 9 kA Icu
decisions.summary: PSCC = 9 kA at the DB busbar; MCBs must meet ≥9 kA Icu per KS 1700:2018 §434 routing chain.

sections.title: Diversity + Zs
sections.summary: Diversified currents per KS 1700:2018 routing to BS 7671 + IET OSG Appendix A (workstations ~150 W per position; kitchenette ~8 A simultaneous; SSU ~0.4 A). Zs verification deferred to calc.zs_loop_impedance per WI3: every circuit has `tool_call_pending_for_zs_verification: true` and flags[] includes TOOL-CALL-PENDING marker.

decisions.label: Kitchenette diversified to 8 A
decisions.summary: 3 worktop sockets + 1 fridge FCU; typical commercial-kitchenette coincidence (kettle + microwave + fridge) gives ~8 A simultaneous against a 20 A MCB.
decisions.rule: Diversity per IET OSG Appendix A (routed via KS 1700:2018)
decisions.code_clause: KS 1700:2018 routing to IET On-Site Guide Appendix A

decisions.label: Zs deferred to calc.zs_loop_impedance
decisions.summary: Loop impedance Zs = Ze + (R1+R2) is computed by the calc skill; all circuits flagged TOOL-CALL-PENDING.

sections.title: Compliance + Assumptions
sections.summary: Design is compliant (compliant=true). Three info flags document: (a) toilet bathroom_zone_3 SSU-only, (b) radial-only topology and its routing chain, (c) deferred Zs verification. Engineer assumes KPLC-declared Ze=0.45Ω and PSCC=9.0 kA will be verified at first energisation per KS 1700:2018 §612.

decisions.label: Ze and PSCC declared, not measured
decisions.summary: KPLC declared values used for design; on-site verification at first energisation required per KS 1700:2018 routing to BS 7671:2018+A2:2022 Chapter 64.

sections.title: Drafting References
sections.summary: Single A1 sheet at 1:50 metric scale. Layer naming follows BS 1192:2007+A2:2016 — the de facto KE design-industry convention for layered electrical drawings (broader Kenyan drafting-standards layer deferred to a future sprint). Layers: `E-POW-OUTLET-GF`, `E-POW-CIRCUIT-GF`, `E-POW-ZONE-BATH` for the toilet zone overlay.

decisions.label: A1 @ 1:50 single-sheet output
decisions.summary: 80 m² floor plate fits comfortably on one A1 sheet at 1:50 with circuit schedule and notes.
decisions.rule: BS 1192:2007+A2:2016 layered drawing conventions (KE industry default)
